title: Kohlhiesels Töchter
actors: Liselotte Pulver, Helmut Schmid, Dietmar Schönherr
plot: Landlord Kohlhiesel has two daughters that couldn't be more different: Liesel, the older one, is a clumsy hoyden; Gretel (Gritli), the younger, is pretty and charming. Gretel wants to marry, but her father won't allow it until Lie...
